Hello, conformance

Hello, conformance. This is a sample article whose only job is to carry enough real prose that Mozilla Readability — the same engine Firefox Reader View runs — can extract it cleanly after the stylesheet is stripped away.

The structure-audit gate runs that extraction as a survivability check: if the semantics of a page live only in CSS, the reader view collapses and the gate fails. A genuine article with paragraphs, headings, and links survives.

Because this paragraph and its siblings hold well over two hundred characters of meaningful text, the reader extraction succeeds and the audit records a passing structure for the page.

Back to writing
